roa.docketEntryComment: DEFENDANTS MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS & SAW PENDING/DAWT/X:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WAS DISCHARGED ON 02-28-22, THAT ISSUE IS OFF CALENDAR/MO GRTD/EMTERM/CONTD:TRIAL/DOPU:ACM/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ONTHE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY CONTACTLAW ENFORCEMENT FOR ONE CIVIL STAND BY AT 149 CALEDONIA ST,,SF/X:ORDER TOPROVIDE POLICE ESCORT FOR CIVIL STANDBY FILED/X: COURT ADMONISHED DEFENDANT OF ACTIVE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED ON12-28-21/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/X:OR DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/BAIL:50,000/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT MAY NOT CONSUMEALCOHOL/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDTR:01-27-22 (30TH DAY)/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR ANIN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SAORD/SA1:LILLIE WILLIAMSON/SA2:149 CALEDONIA ST,,SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PTC & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 01-06-22//CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 01-14-22/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/NP/CAUSE1/X:COVID ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/LD:01-27-22(GC)/CONT/DEF:IS PLACED ON A 2 HOURS STANDBY/
